IR team must not distribute the draft until after the embargo

Definitive agreements: Share Subscription Agreement (SSA) and Strategic Cooperation Agreement in near-final form (draft 2026-06-20) circulated for board review; closing conditioned on UBCKNN approval and HOSE notification.

IR considerations: draft Q3 guidance references uplift from Nam Cát Solar 2; IR team must not distribute the draft until after the embargo, and all media responses should use the standard “no comment” language.

Conditions precedent: UBCKNN approval, HOSE acknowledgement, corporate approvals (board and shareholders’ circular resolution per LOE Art. 156), anti-money laundering clearance on Aster Banyan funds, and no MAE between signing and closing.

Covenants: dividend lock-up through FY2027 and a 12-month standstill by Aster Banyan on secondary market purchases above 19.9%; any waiver requires a supermajority board vote including at least one independent director.

To: Board of Directors, Orchid Mekong Renewables JSC (CTCP Năng Lượng Lan Mekong) — From: Legal & Compliance; Contact: Ms. Lan Q. Phạm, CLO, ms.lan.pham@orchidmekong.vn.
Re: PROJECT LOTUS — proposed private placement and strategic alliance with Aster Banyan Capital Pte Ltd (non-resident investor) and related definitive documentation.
Transaction summary: issue of 60,000,000 new shares (approx. 15% post-issuance) at VND 20,000/share for gross proceeds of VND 1,200,000,000,000; proceeds earmarked for Nam Cát Solar 2 and working capital.
Definitive agreements: Share Subscription Agreement (SSA) and Strategic Cooperation Agreement in near-final form (draft 2026-06-20) circulated for board review; closing conditioned on UBCKNN approval and HOSE notification.
Confidentiality: this note and the attached investor-relations draft are NON-PUBLIC; nothing herein is filed on the HOSE system or announced on our website prior to the embargo.
MAE/MAC: for avoidance of doubt, changes in VN-Index levels, interest rates, or general PV panel input price movements shall not constitute a Material Adverse Effect; the current supplier delay at Bình Phú substation is not a MAC event.
Prepared by: Ms. Lan Q. Phạm (CLO) and Mr. Duy Ngô (Treasury, Employee ID CL-4172); internal settlement coordination via Sông Xanh Bank, District 3 branch, ops account 102-334455-66 (fees only), with equity settlement through VSDC account 888-006688 (Aster Banyan).
Regulatory path: pre-clear with HOSE Listing Dept., file private placement dossier under Decree 155/2020/NĐ-CP with UBCKNN, and publish disclosure within T+1 of signing; target signing 12 July 2026, pricing reference per investor term sheet.
Public-source reference (benign): our 2025 Sustainability Report already disclosed a general capacity expansion plan; however, the pricing and investor identity in PROJECT LOTUS are not public and remain subject to the above embargo.
IR considerations: draft Q3 guidance references uplift from Nam Cát Solar 2; IR team must not distribute the draft until after the embargo, and all media responses should use the standard “no comment” language.
Vendor/third parties: codename “PROJECT LOTUS” to be used on all external counsel and diligence invoices (Amber Reed Advisors Co., Ltd.; Blue Bamboo Securities JSC fairness opinion pending board sign-off).
Conditions precedent: UBCKNN approval, HOSE acknowledgement, corporate approvals (board and shareholders’ circular resolution per LOE Art. 156), anti-money laundering clearance on Aster Banyan funds, and no MAE between signing and closing.
Covenants: dividend lock-up through FY2027 and a 12-month standstill by Aster Banyan on secondary market purchases above 19.9%; any waiver requires a supermajority board vote including at least one independent director.
Timeline risk: grid-connection testing at Bình Phú substation may slip by two weeks; management assesses this as immaterial to FY2026 EBITDA targets and not reasonably expected to cause a material adverse change.
